name: Pixel Pop
author: Poki
description: Pixel Pop is a rhythmic arcade game where timing is everything! Follow the beat, slice through flying fruit, and stay in sync with the music. Watch out—apples are tricky to chop, and bombs will cost you! Each round throws you into a fresh, fast-paced scenario where precision and rhythm lead to victory. Can you master the beat and chop your way to the top? How to play Pixel Pop? Use the mouse to strike at the right moment! Who created Pixel Pop? Pixel Pop was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Bad Ice-Cream 3 ! How can I play Pixel Pop for free? You can play Pixel Pop for free on Poki.
